name: 电路
subject: physics
domain_name: 电与磁 / Electricity & Magnetism / Electricity & Magnetism
curriculum_points: HS-PS3-1. Create a computational model to calculate the change in the energy of one component in a system when the change in energy of the other component(s) and energy flows in and out of the system are known.
HS-PS3-3. Design, build, and refine a device that works within given constraints to convert one form of energy into another form of energy.

HS-PS3-5. Develop and use a model of two objects interacting through electric or magnetic fields to illustrate the forces between objects and the changes in energy of the objects due to the interaction.

interactive_resources.description: PhET 电路构建：搭电路测电流电压（中文版）
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系
